summary: Backend testing of Secondary Focus Injection Fix (Item 1 P0 Bug). All 16 tests passed 100%. SECONDARY_SYNERGY map expanded to cover all 30+ session types correctly allows/blocks injections per session type, fallback changed from [] to 'any', and max 2 injections per week enforced.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user cbd82a69-3a37-48c2-88e8-0fe95081fa4b
context_for_next_testing_agent: Secondary focus injection fix fully verified. SECONDARY_SYNERGY map covers all session types. Key test evidence: (1) upper_push_heavy synergy=['core','shoulders','triceps','chest','arms'] → injects rear_delt; (2) lower_quad_focus synergy=['core','glutes','calves','hamstrings','legs','quads'] → shoulder injection BLOCKED; (3) upper_pull_heavy synergy=['core','back','biceps','shoulders','arms'] → injects vertical_push; (4) MAX_SECONDARY_INJECTIONS=2 enforced across all test runs. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_secondary_focus_injection.py (16 tests). Backend logs confirm via [secondary] debug lines.

TestCoreInjectionFullBodySplit.details: Full body 3-day split + core secondary: all 3 days are 'any' compatible but only 2 get injected (MAX limit). Core exercises confirmed in ≥1 day. Exercise count with secondary >= without.

TestShoulderInjectionUpperLowerSplit.details: 4-day upper_lower split + shoulders secondary: upper days (upper_push_heavy, upper_pull_heavy) received shoulder injection (rear_delt and vertical_push respectively). Lower days (lower_quad_focus, lower_hip_focus) had 0 injections. Max 2 injections per week confirmed. exercise_type='accessory' used for injection. Upper days gained +1 exercise vs baseline.

TestInjectionCountIntegrity.details: Cross-check: total extra exercises ≤2 for both upper_lower+shoulders and full_body+core. 3rd full_body day correctly NOT injected (MAX=2 reached).

TestPreconditions.details: Health check OK, test user has_access=True (admin reason)

rca_of_issue: ROOT CAUSE: SECONDARY_SYNERGY map was missing 20+ session types (upper_push_heavy, lower_full, all hybrid/functional/calisthenics). SECONDARY_SYNERGY.get(session_type, []) defaulted to [] for missing types → synergy_list=[] → compatible=False → all injections blocked. Also existing synergy lists were too narrow (e.g. push_session=['core','chest','triceps','shoulders','arms'] excluded 'shoulders'). FIXES: (1) Expanded SECONDARY_SYNERGY to cover all 30+ session types with correct synergy lists, (2) Changed fallback from [] to 'any' so unlisted session types allow all secondary focuses. VERIFIED: 16/16 automated tests pass, backend debug logs confirm correct injection/skip decisions per session type.
